title: All Hail
subtitle: The risen Lord meets the women returning from the tomb, and they hold His feet

stillness: As long as you are able to pray,
let no sleep break in upon your delights;
let no outward tumult disturb you.
Be still, and seek Him whom your soul loves.
gospel: As the three Marys went on together,
before they reached the city and the Apostles —
behold, the Lord Jesus met them and appeared to them.
and took hold of His feet, and kissed them,
Go, tell my brethren that they go into Galilee;
So Mary Magdalene came, telling the disciples:
I have seen the Lord, and these things He said to me.
behold: Attend to each thing as if you were present.
Behold the women who sought Him, who ran so hard:
they deserved to find the rising Lord meeting them on the way.
He shows Himself thus to all who begin the road of the virtues,
running to their aid that they may come to everlasting salvation.
With a gentle greeting He lifts up the cast-down,
and with a word of comfort He consoles the sorrowing.
Out of Eva He forms an Ave —
that the curse of the woman Eve might be loosed in women.
See them, gladdened beyond what can be told, draw near,
now believing, now enlightened by faith.
Behold: they hold the feet of Jesus.
Running to Him with overflowing joy,
they take, even by touch, the certainty of His Resurrection.
consider: This is the way of coming to pardon: drawing near to the feet of Christ.
We must go to kiss the foot of Christ by devout prayer,
If you would grasp the height of God, grasp first the humanity of Christ.
He draws near through enlightening faith — Come to Him, and be enlightened;
He is held fast through joining love — I held Him, and will not let Him go;
He is adored through the worship that is owed.
And now to Magdalene it is given to touch Him —
when she sought the living among the dead, in the place of the dead.
The most merciful tenderness of God is here declared toward the woman.
The woman who had been the gate of death
is the first to preach the Resurrection, and shows the gate of life.
She who once told her husband the words of the death-bearing serpent
now tells the words of her Life-giver.
The women do the work of Evangelists, and are made Apostles to the Apostles.
And you — whoever rightly understands ought to tell it to others.
Do not be rebuked for a buried talent;
what is revealed to you, set eagerly before your neighbours.
prayer: O Jesus, our redemption, our love and our longing,
who to the devout women seeking You, desiring You,
rising from the dead in mercy willed to come and appear —
I seek You, whom my soul loves, O sweetest Jesus;
I seek, and I do not find:
come, then, to my soul that seeks You,
O only Son of God the Father.
And if You delay Your desirable presence now,
do not take it from me in the time to come;
that in the last resurrection of the faithful
You may show Yourself to me, gentle and kind, with them,
and that of Your presence I may forever rejoice with Your elect. Amen.

latinJewel.latin: Mulier, quæ fuerat janua mortis, prima prædicat resurrectionem, et ostendit januam vitæ.
latinJewel.english: The woman who had been the gate of death is the first to preach the Resurrection, and shows the gate of life.
